purpose: Daily complete AOI 4 km grid with five final display products.

fill_policy.window_days: configured by --fill-window-days; MVP default deployment is 5
fill_policy.failure_policy: Any final product null or NaN fails the job; Gold display outputs are complete.

formulas.sea_temperature_celsius: coalesce(sst4, nsst, sst), then apply the fill policy
formulas.ocean_productivity_score: chlor_a / daily_aoi_avg(chlor_a) + poc / daily_aoi_avg(poc) + nflh / daily_aoi_avg(nflh)
formulas.sustainability_pressure: fishing_hours / max(ocean_productivity_score, 1e-9); zero when fishing_hours is zero
